name: User Maintenance
description: Create, modify, or display SAP user accounts. Manage logon data, roles, and profiles.

name: Authorization Check
description: Display the last failed authorization check for a user. Essential first step when a user reports an access issue.

name: Role Maintenance
description: Create, edit, and assign SAP roles. Manage authorizations within roles and generate authorization profiles.

name: Transport Organizer
description: Create, manage, and release Workbench transport requests. Used for ABAP development objects.

name: Customizing Transport Organizer
description: Manage Customizing transport requests. Used for configuration and IMG settings.

name: Transport Management System
description: Manage the transport landscape, import queues, and perform imports across systems.

name: ABAP Runtime Error Analysis
description: Display and analyze ABAP short dumps (runtime errors). Investigate program crashes with full stack trace.

name: Background Job Overview
description: Monitor, analyze, and manage background jobs. Check job status, view job logs, cancel or reschedule jobs.

name: System Log
description: View the SAP system log. Useful for tracking system-level errors, failed logons, and critical events.

name: Work Process Overview
description: Monitor all active work processes in the current application server. Check for hung processes.

name: Global Work Process Overview
description: Monitor work processes across all application servers in the system landscape.

name: HTTP Service Configuration
description: Activate, deactivate, and configure Internet Communication Framework (ICF) services. Required for OData, Fiori, and web services.

name: OData Service Builder
description: Build and maintain OData services in the SAP Gateway. Define entity types, associations, and service operations.

name: Activate and Maintain Services
description: Activate and manage OData services on the Gateway hub system. Register backend services and configure service endpoints.

name: Backend Gateway Cache Cleanup
description: Clear the OData metadata cache on the backend system. Run when OData service changes are not reflected.

name: Gateway Frontend Cache Cleanup
description: Clear the OData metadata cache on the Gateway frontend. Run after backend cache cleanup for full refresh.

name: Display Purchase Order
description: Display an existing purchase order. View header data, line items, delivery schedules, and conditions.

name: Create Purchase Order
description: Create a new purchase order manually. Specify vendor, material, quantity, and delivery details.

name: Warehouse Stocks of Material
description: Display stock overview of materials across storage locations and plants.

name: Display Cost Center
description: Display cost center master data including assignments, responsible managers, and validity periods.

name: Create Cost Center
description: Create a new cost center. Define controlling area assignment, category, and responsible person.

name: Display Cost Center Group
description: Display cost center groups (hierarchies) used in reporting and planning.

name: CATS: Time Sheet Entry
description: Enter working times and activities in the Cross-Application Time Sheet (CATS). Used for project time recording.

name: Maintain HR Master Data
description: Maintain employee master data infotypes such as personal data, organizational assignment, and payroll data.

name: Workload Analysis for Workflow
description: Analyze workflow workitems by task, agent, or status. Identify stuck or unprocessed workflow items.

name: Execute Workitem Administratively
description: Execute, forward, or complete a workflow workitem with administrator rights. Used to unblock stuck workflows.
